symptom_description: Cooling tower fan motor tripped VFD/overload breaker (`278 Amps` overcurrent). Motor frame burning hot (`98`°C) with `progressive` smoke from terminal box. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit CHILL-302.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.010 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.016 gap`) over `9 months`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`Spec-944`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`136 ft-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.48 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: Severe vibration (`0.34` in/sec) detected on fan deck. Motor cooling fins packed solidly with `0.15 inch` of cooling tower mineral scale.
root_cause: Phase loss (`4160V` dropped on Phase B) on incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout (`107`°C) of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor (`P/N 9505-A`), renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease (`Spec-476`), and tested VFD speed steps (`28 Hz`).
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Dry patches (`17%` un-wetted area) visible across top of PVC fill media. Hot water basin overflowing (`293 GPM`) around distribution basin edges.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`2.8 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`P/N 3973-A`), installed new target nozzles (`Spec-568`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`3.0 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged (`90%` blocked) with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Failure of bypass valve linkage (`282 in-lbs` broken) dumped full condenser flow (`850 GPM`) over one cell, overwhelming the distribution basin capacity.
action_taken: Repaired bypass valve mechanical linkage (`Spec-732`), manually cleared `53%` blockage from distribution pan, rebalanced cell flow valves, and checked nozzle patterns.
parts_used: Bypass Valve Actuator Arm, Distribution Pan Sweeper Nozzle, Flow Balancing Valve Kit

symptom_description: Ops reported water splashing outside tower louvers (`slight` drift loss). Top deck distribution basin nozzles 40% blocked with algae/silt (`0.06 inch`).
root_cause: Accumulation of wind-blown leaves, plastic wrappers, and organic debris (`3.3 lbs`) in hot water distribution basin plugging nozzle orifices (`0.019 gap`).
action_taken: Removed hot water basin covers, manually cleared leaves/debris (`4.0 lbs`) from all distribution nozzles, pressure washed basin (`49 PSI`), and chlorinated loop.
parts_used: Polypropylene Target Spray Nozzles (15-Pack), Basin Cover Fasteners

symptom_description: Severe vibration (`0.21` in/sec) detected on fan deck. Motor cooling fins packed solidly with `0.13 inch` of cooling tower mineral scale.
root_cause: Moisture and corrosive cooling tower mist penetrated motor terminal enclosure, causing insulation breakdown (`0.15 Mega-ohms` resistance) across stator leads.
action_taken: Removed failed cooling tower fan motor using crane, installed severe-duty TEFC replacement motor (`Spec-473`), renewed shaft alignment (`0.005 inch`), and sealed terminal box with RTV.
parts_used: Severe-Duty TEFC Cooling Tower Motor 25HP, Composite Coupling Element, RTV Silicone Sealant

symptom_description: Gearbox low oil level alarm triggered (`46%` remaining). Input shaft seal leaking oil (`concerning`) onto fan motor housing.
root_cause: Phase loss (`460V` dropped on Phase B) on incoming feed caused single-phasing thermal burnout (`165`°C) of cooling tower induction motor windings.
action_taken: Installed new vertical fan drive motor (`Spec-444`), renewed motor shaft seal and rain canopy, greased bearings with waterproof grease (`Spec-376`), and tested VFD speed steps (`56 Hz`).
parts_used: Inverter-Duty Fan Motor Assembly, Lower Bearing Waterproof Lip Seal, Mounting Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Tower basin water level dropping rapidly (`-21%` volume). Makeup valve wide open (`220 GPM`) but cannot keep up due to massive splash-out.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`1.9 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`Spec-838`), installed new target nozzles (`P/N 7537-REV2`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`4.9 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)

symptom_description: Cooling tower basin water temperature rising above `32°C` alarm setpoint (`+80`°C spike). Fan motor stationary (`0 Amps` draw, `4160V` at terminals).
root_cause: Prolonged operation in saturated 100% humidity environment degraded Class F insulation varnish beyond dielectric limit after `24302` hours.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor and gearbox shaft coupling element (`Spec-534`), sealed conduit connections against moisture ingress, and performed laser alignment (`0.018 tolerance`).
parts_used: Severe-Duty Fan Motor 30HP, Shaft Coupling Kit, Waterproof Conduit Gland Set

symptom_description: Pump cavitation high-pitched squealing sound from condenser water pump (`27 Hz` frequency) due to air entrainment from severe channeling through tower fill.
root_cause: Severe algae and biological slime mats (`0.05 inch` thick) broke loose from distribution header piping and lodged inside target spray nozzles.
action_taken: Disassembled and cleaned 36 target spray nozzles (`Spec-947`), flushed main distribution header piping, installed new coarse inlet strainer baskets (`Spec-515`), and shock-chlorinated tower.
parts_used: Replacement Distribution Nozzles (24-Pack), Coarse Mesh Inlet Strainer Basket, Shock Biocide (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Loud high grinding chattering sound from cooling tower fan gearbox/motor coupling. Fan blades spinning erratically (`24 Hz` speed fluctuations).
root_cause: Prolonged operation in saturated 100% humidity environment degraded Class F insulation varnish beyond dielectric limit after `31598` hours.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor and gearbox shaft coupling element (`P/N 4627-REV2`), sealed conduit connections against moisture ingress, and performed laser alignment (`0.006 tolerance`).
parts_used: Severe-Duty Fan Motor 30HP, Shaft Coupling Kit, Waterproof Conduit Gland Set

symptom_description: Ops noted persistent scale shedding from drift eliminators into cold water basin (`slight` debris accumulation near suction screen).
root_cause: Conductivity controller probe fouling (`0.05 inch` coating) caused false low readings (`58 Hz uS/cm`), preventing automatic blowdown initiation.
action_taken: Removed and acid-cleaned conductivity controller probe (`Spec-790`), verified calibration (`45 Hz uS/cm`), manually triggered blowdown (`206 GPM`), and flushed basin.
parts_used: Conductivity Probe Cleaning Solution, Blowdown Valve Rebuild Kit, Calibration Fluid

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.05 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) on motor leads. Also inspected CHILL-302 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade imbalance (`0.003 inch` pitch deviation) destroyed motor output shaft bearings (`0.011 gap`) over `1 years`.
action_taken: Replaced fan motor (`P/N 3667-C`), adjusted fan blade pitch angle (`371 in-lbs` bolt torque), rebalanced hub assembly, and verified vibration (`< 0.41 in/sec`).
parts_used: TEAO Cooling Tower Motor 40HP, Fan Hub Balancing Kit, Pitch Protractor Tool

symptom_description: VFD indicating ground fault trip on cooling tower fan feed. Megger test shows dead short (`0.08 Mega-ohms` insulation resistance) on motor leads.
root_cause: Gearbox input shaft lip seal failure (`0.22 inch` gap) allowed moisture ingress, turning lubricating gear oil into an emulsion (`39%` water).
action_taken: Drained emulsified gearbox oil, replaced input shaft seal (`Spec-102`), installed new severe-duty motor (`Spec-715`), and refilled with `69 lbs gal` synthetic gear lube.
parts_used: Gearbox Input Seal, Synthetic Gear Oil ISO 220 (5 Gal), Severe-Duty Motor 20HP

symptom_description: Multiple distribution target nozzles completely plugged (`65%` blocked) with debris, causing heavy localized channeling and splashing inside tower.
root_cause: Structural collapse of fiberglass distribution header pipe (`2.9 ft` section) due to winter freeze damage, dumping water straight into basin.
action_taken: Replaced shattered fiberglass header section (`P/N 8176-X`), installed new target nozzles (`Spec-146`), flushed system of fiberglass shards (`3.6 lbs`), and verified distribution pattern.
parts_used: FRP Header Pipe Section (10ft), Flange Gasket Kit, Target Spray Nozzle Set (12x)
